hero_desc: Celebrate your love story surrounded by lush Veale Gardens, panoramic windows, and the finest French & Mediterranean cuisine.
intro_para1: Adelaide Pavilion has been the setting for thousands of love stories since 2003. Nestled within the enchanting Veale Gardens, our venue offers an incomparable combination of natural beauty, architectural elegance, and truly personal service.
intro_para2: Our award-winning team — led by dedicated Event Coordinators — will guide you through every detail, from your first enquiry to the last dance, ensuring your wedding day unfolds exactly as you've imagined.
testimonial_quote: The staff at Adelaide Pavilion did an amazing job. The food was absolutely delicious and good portions. They did a fantastic job setting up — couldn't be happier with the place I chose to hold my reception.
